title: program-verify output data
description:
The program roll-up — a projection over recorded reproduction judgments.

A not-fully-reproduced program is a ``needs_decision`` FINDING (exit-0), never
an error: the verdict DISCLOSES, never gates. ``recipe_signature`` is the
``extract-recipe`` seed's signature (null for an explicit list);
``program_signature`` is this program manifest's own deterministic digest —
the write-once file is ``program-<program_signature[:12]>.json``.

program_schema_version.description: Bumped when the emitted program-verify shape changes incompatibly.
program_schema_version.title: Program Schema Version

seed_kind.description: Which program-identity source resolved the run-set.
seed_kind.title: Seed Kind

seed_ref.description: The seed's identity / path verbatim (the run-set list for explicit).
seed_ref.title: Seed Ref

recipe_signature.description: The extract-recipe seed's signature over the minimal run-set; null for an explicit list.
recipe_signature.title: Recipe Signature

program_signature.description: This program manifest's deterministic 64-hex digest — the write-once file name key.
program_signature.title: Program Signature

reproduced_count.description: How many constituents classified reproduced_within_tolerance (k of N).
reproduced_count.title: Reproduced Count

overall.description: The program roll-up: the most severe constituent classification (mismatch_on_record > no_reproduction_on_record = evidence_stale_identity > evidence_incomparable > reproduced_within_tolerance).
overall.title: Overall

needs_decision.description: True unless every constituent reproduced_within_tolerance — a FINDING the human decides on (exit-0); a stale-identity constituent forces it True.
needs_decision.title: Needs Decision

reason.description: Code-rendered one-line program summary (k/N reproduced + per-class counts + gaps).
reason.title: Reason

gaps.description: The extract-recipe identity-walk gaps passed through (G4a table→run-set link, pack-csv opaque, operator-bypass); empty for an explicit list.
gaps.title: Gaps

manifest_path.description: Absolute path of the write-once program manifest (.hpc/provenance/program-<sig[:12]>.json).
manifest_path.title: Manifest Path

manifest_delta.description: Disclosed content-drift delta when a prior manifest for the same seed had a different signature; null on a clean/idempotent write.
manifest_delta.title: Manifest Delta

markdown.description: The code-rendered program report (deterministic; LLM-free render path).
markdown.title: Markdown

ConstituentVerdict.description:
One constituent run's recorded reproduction evidence — a projection.

Every field is READ off records already on disk: the classification off the
reproduction receipt's ``overall`` vocabulary, the reason code-rendered from
the driving receipt's own keys, the identity fields off the sidecar, and the
drift disclosures echoed verbatim from the receipt (never re-derived). The
verb never names a metric value.

classification.description: The receipt-derived classification of this constituent's reproduction evidence.
classification.title: Classification

reason.description: Code-rendered reason, read off the driving receipt's own keys (never LLM-authored).
reason.title: Reason

receipt_count.description: How many reproduction receipts name this constituent as the original.
receipt_count.title: Receipt Count

repro_run_ids.description: The reproduction run ids whose receipts named this constituent (the reproduces back-link).
repro_run_ids.title: Repro Run Ids

fingerprint_samples.description: Count of determinism-fingerprint ledger samples for this constituent's current identity.
fingerprint_samples.title: Fingerprint Samples

driving_receipt.description: The reproduction receipt that determined the classification, embedded verbatim; null when none on record.
driving_receipt.title: Driving Receipt

env_identity.description: The driving receipt's environment-lock disclosure, echoed read-only; null when the receipt carries none.
env_identity.title: Env Identity

hw_identity.description: The driving receipt's hardware-placement disclosure, echoed read-only; null when the receipt carries none.
hw_identity.title: Hw Identity

data_identity.description: The driving receipt's data-identity disclosure, echoed read-only; null when the receipt carries none.
data_identity.title: Data Identity

diverged_stage.description: The driving receipt's localized diverging stage (data-trace interlock), echoed read-only; null when none.
diverged_stage.title: Diverged Stage

ConstituentVerdict.title: program constituent verdict
